text:
Created attachment 188358
patch to update the port

- update 2.13 -> 2.15
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/DROLSKY/DateTime-TimeZone-2.15/Changes
- fix TEST_DEPENDS
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20171111 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.24.3 runs ok.
- "make test" for this port (as run from within the same poudriere's jail) say: "PASS".
